scripts.dev: tsx --watch src/index.ts & cd frontend && npx vite build --watch & wait
scripts.build:serial: cd src/serial/native && node-gyp rebuild && (pkg-config --exists fuse3 2>/dev/null && gcc -Wall -O2 cuse_serial.c -o build/Release/cuse_serial $(pkg-config --cflags --libs fuse3) -lpthread || true)
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:preload && npm run build:serial && tsc
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.postinstall: [ -f src/serial/native/pty_pair.c ] && ([ "$(uname)" = "Linux" ] && make -C preload 2>/dev/null; cd src/serial/native && node-gyp rebuild 2>/dev/null) || true
